homepage.title: Your international industrial service provider. We offer customised solutions in industrial automation, industrial trade and industrial service
homepage.description: More than 1300 people in over 30 locations offer complete services in the areas industrial-automation, industrial-trade and industrial-service.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Your international industrial service provider. We offer customised solutions in industrial automation, industrial trade and industrial service
This page is available in your language.
Take me there.
No thanks.
WE DELIVER SOLUTIONS.
Your international industrial service provider
We, the Blumenbecker Group, with our three areas of competence –
Industrial-Automation
Industrial-Trade
and
Industrial-Service
- are the competent partner at the side of industry and trade. Both nationally and internationally.
We offer
customised
and
tailor-made solutions
as well as complementary services for process automation, control technology, industrial maintenance and industrial supplies.
With companies in Germany, large parts of Eastern Europe, India, China (P.R.) and the USA, we can also assist our customers with
industrial relocations, plant relocations and automation projects and support them in global competition. Blumenbecker is on site wherever you need our services.
Blumenbecker is diversity and uniqueness. Blumenbecker is regional and international. Blumenbecker is traditional and innovative. As different as the requirements of our customers may be, our brand promise remains consistent:
We deliver solutions.

B.AI AI-powered robotic cell
AI-controlled robotic cell for automated part retrieval and picking. Real-time object recognition without CAD data, compatible with standard industrial robots.

New Managing Director of Blumenbecker Group
On March 1, 2026, Jan Wiethoff took over the position of CFO and spokesperson for the management board of B+M Blumenbecker GmbH.

11.02.2026
For generations - since generations
In “Generations at Blumenbecker,” we introduce employees who share a special family connection with one another.

23.01.2026
New managing director at Blumenbecker Technik GmbH
Olaf Lingnau will take over as managing director at Blumenbecker Technik GmbH on January 1, 2026. He succeeds Ralf Herzog, who will retire on March 31, 2026.
Learn more
15.12.2025
Blumenbecker donates to moorland conservation
With the initiative “Donations instead of Gifts“ Blumenbecker donates €10,000 for peatland protection in Lower Saxony.
Learn more
10.12.2025
SOLUTIONS. - Edition 2025/26 is published
The new issue of our company magazine ‘SOLUTIONS.’ is now available with reports on our diverse customer solutions and other interesting features.

Cookie settings
Category

Necessary
Our website uses some necessary cookies so that the site can properly function. You can set your browser to block all cookies. However, some areas of the website may not work then. We also use the necessary cookies to save for you the settings you have made, such as the language selection. This is to improve your user experience.
Statistics and marketing
To improve our offer and our website, we collect anonymized data for statistics and analysis. With the help of these cookies, we can, for example, measure the number of visitors and the traffic on certain pages and optimize our content. We use Google Analytics and Meta Pixel on our site for this purpose.
